improvements.areaName: SEO Meta Description and OG Tags
improvements.suggestion: <meta name="description" content="Gideon is your AI-powered trade and business assistant. Get instant answers, voice chat, and professional support for operations and trade decisions. Try three free searches today."><meta property="og:title" content="GDN AI – Meet Gideon, Your Business & Trade Assistant"><meta property="og:description" content="AI-powered answers for business owners, traders, and professionals. Voice chat, unlimited workspace, and expert trade support. Start with three free searches."><meta property="og:type" content="website"><meta property="og:url" content="https://www.gdn.ai/"><meta property="og:image" content="https://www.gdn.ai/og-image.jpg">
improvements.rationale: A clear meta description improves click-through rates from search results by communicating the core value prop and free trial offer. Open Graph tags ensure professional, branded previews when the homepage is shared on LinkedIn, Twitter, or Facebook—critical for B2B credibility. Including the three free searches CTA encourages clicks without overpromising.

improvements.suggestion:
Hero Headline: "Meet Gideon — Your AI-Powered Trade & Business Assistant"

Subheading: "Get instant answers, voice chat support, and professional guidance for your business operations. Try three searches free — no credit card required."
improvements.rationale: This headline immediately establishes what Gideon is (AI assistant) and who it serves (trade and business professionals). The subheading highlights three key value props (instant answers, voice chat, professional guidance) while clearly communicating the risk-free trial offer. The 'no credit card required' implication from free searches removes friction and builds trust.

improvements.suggestion:
Q: What happens after my three free searches?

A: Once you've used your three complimentary searches, you'll be invited to become a Gideon member. Membership starts at just US$2 per day, giving you unlimited access to your AI-powered trade and business assistant—including voice chat and your own members workspace. Choose annual billing and save 30 percent.
improvements.rationale: This FAQ directly addresses the most common friction point—the paywall after the free trial. It transparently explains what happens next, reinforces value (unlimited access, voice chat, workspace), and highlights the annual discount to encourage commitment. Reducing uncertainty at this decision point improves conversion.
